# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

Reviewed `git diff` in full; the working-tree changes are limited to `.ralph-burning/projects/9ni912-1/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/9ni912-1/run.json` only. Since `.ralph-burning/` is explicitly out of scope for review, there are no in-scope implementation changes to assess and no actionable findings were identified.

## Amendments

None.
